about.sponsorHint: If EcoPaste helps your workflow, you can support the project.

export.encryptedHint: The backup will be encrypted with this password. EcoPaste will not save it, and forgotten passwords cannot be recovered.
export.passwordMin: Backup password must be at least 8 characters
export.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
export.plainConfirm: I have read the warning and confirm exporting an unencrypted backup
export.plainWarning: Anyone with the file can read the backup contents directly.
export.plainWarningTitle: Plain backups are not password protected
export.title: Export EcoPaste Backup

import.overwriteConfirm: I have read the warning and confirm overwriting current data
import.overwriteWarning: Overwrite import replaces the selected current data immediately. Merge import is safer for everyday recovery; use overwrite only when the backup should become the source of truth.
import.title: Import EcoPaste Backup

received.encrypted: Encrypted backup recognized. Import requires the backup password.

backup.description: Export or import EcoPaste backup packages.
backup.title: Backup & Migration

checkUpdates.description: Check whether a new EcoPaste version is available.
checkUpdates.title: Check for Updates

sponsor.description: If EcoPaste helps your workflow, you can support the project.
sponsor.title: Sponsor

deleteConfirm.description: Ask before deleting regular history records. Favorited and pinned records use their own switches.
deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Regular Deletes

deleteFavoriteConfirm.description: Ask before deleting favorited records to prevent losing important items.
deleteFavoriteConfirm.title: Confirm Favorite Deletes

deleteFavoriteItems.description: When off, favorited records hide delete actions and ignore delete shortcuts.
deleteFavoriteItems.title: Allow Favorite Deletes

deleteFavoriteItemsOnlyInFavoriteGroup.description: When on, favorited records hide delete actions outside Favorites; regular records are unaffected.
deleteFavoriteItemsOnlyInFavoriteGroup.title: Delete Favorites Only in Favorites

deletePinnedConfirm.description: Ask before deleting pinned records to prevent losing important items.
deletePinnedConfirm.title: Confirm Pinned Deletes

deletePinnedItems.description: When off, pinned records hide delete actions and ignore delete shortcuts.
deletePinnedItems.title: Allow Pinned Deletes

visible.description: Choose which action buttons appear when hovering over a record.
visible.title: Visible Quick Actions

fileMaxCount.description: Limit how many files are shown in each file record card.
fileMaxCount.title: Maximum Files Shown

imageMaxHeight.description: Limit thumbnail height for image records in the list.
imageMaxHeight.title: Maximum Image Height

showOriginalPreview.description: Records with notes show the note by default, then temporarily reveal original content when hovering over the card.
showOriginalPreview.title: Show Original on Hover

textMaxLines.description: Limit how many lines are shown in each text record card.
textMaxLines.title: Maximum Text Lines

theme.description: Use light mode, dark mode, or follow the system appearance.
theme.title: Theme

exportHistory.description: Export a .ecopastebak backup, encrypted with a password by default.
exportHistory.title: Export Backup

importHistory.description: Import a .ecopastebak backup, with merge or overwrite recovery.
importHistory.title: Import Backup

files.description: When off, copied files and folders are not saved to history.
files.title: Files and Folders

html.description: When off, rich text with HTML format is not saved to history.
html.title: HTML Content

image.description: When off, clipboard images are not saved to history.
image.title: Image

maxImageMb.description: Images larger than this are not saved to history. Set to 0 for no limit.
maxImageMb.title: Maximum Image Capture Size

maxTextMb.description: Text, HTML, or RTF larger than this is not saved to history. Set to 0 for no limit.
maxTextMb.title: Maximum Text Capture Size

order.description: When the clipboard contains multiple formats, save the first matching type in this order.
order.title: Capture Order

rtf.description: When off, rich text with RTF format is not saved to history.
rtf.title: RTF Content

text.description: When off, copied plain text is not saved to history.
text.title: Plain Text

autoStart.description: Start EcoPaste automatically after logging in.
autoStart.title: Launch at Login

dockIcon.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the system desktop bar.

macos.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the Dock.
macos.title: Dock Icon

dockIcon.title: Desktop Bar Icon

windows.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the taskbar.
windows.title: Taskbar Icon

silentStart.description: When launched at login, run in the background without opening the clipboard window.
silentStart.title: Silent Start

trayIcon.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the system status area.

macos.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the menu bar.
macos.title: Menu Bar Icon

trayIcon.title: Status Area Icon

windows.description: Show the EcoPaste icon in the system tray.
windows.title: System Tray Icon

hideWindow.description: After copying a history record, automatically hide the clipboard window.
hideWindow.title: Hide Window After Copy

plainDefault.description: When copying text records, strip HTML/RTF formatting and copy plain text by default.
plainDefault.title: Copy as Plain Text by Default

sound.description: Play a sound when new clipboard content is saved to history.
sound.title: Copy Sound

updateOnReuse.description: Refresh use time and usage count when copying or pasting a history record.
updateOnReuse.title: Update Record on Reuse

resetPreferences.confirmContent: This restores every preference to its default value, but keeps clipboard history records.
resetPreferences.description: Restore all preference defaults while keeping history records.
resetPreferences.title: Reset All Preferences

windowLifecycle.description: Inspect window lifecycle, destroy protection, and lightweight-mode state for troubleshooting hidden-window resource usage.
windowLifecycle.generationHint: Adds 1 when moving from non-visible to visible; re-showing an already visible window does not add.
windowLifecycle.locksHint: Shown as dirty owners / keepalive leases; any nonzero value delays destroy.
windowLifecycle.title: Window Lifecycle

cleanupIntervalHours.description: Check and clean history every specified number of hours. 0 disables periodic cleanup; startup cleanup still runs once.
cleanupIntervalHours.title: Auto Cleanup Interval

maxCount.description: When the limit is exceeded, older regular records are cleaned automatically; favorites and pinned items are always kept. 0 means unlimited items.
maxCount.title: Maximum Items

retention.description: Regular records older than this many days are cleaned automatically; favorites and pinned items are always kept. 0 disables time-based cleanup.
retention.title: Retention Period

cleanCache.confirmContent: This removes images, thumbnails, and icon cache files that are no longer referenced by history. Resources still in use are kept.
cleanCache.description: Remove image, thumbnail, and icon cache files no longer referenced by history.
cleanCache.title: Clean Cache

dataDirectory.description: Open the directory containing the history database, settings, and resource cache.
dataDirectory.title: Data Directory

logDirectory.description: Open the runtime log directory used for troubleshooting.
logDirectory.title: Log Directory

autoFavorite.description: When saving a non-empty note, automatically add that record to favorites.
autoFavorite.title: Auto-Favorite When Noted

customGroups.description: Adjust custom group order, visibility, names, and icons.
customGroups.title: Custom Groups

autoPaste.description: Choose what happens when clicking a history record with the left mouse button.
autoPaste.title: Left Mouse Button

fileMode.description: When pasting file records, paste file paths by default instead of the files themselves.
fileMode.title: Paste File Paths by Default

middleClick.description: Choose what happens when clicking a history record with the middle mouse button.
middleClick.title: Middle Mouse Button

plainDefault.description: When pasting text records, strip HTML/RTF formatting and paste plain text by default.
plainDefault.title: Paste as Plain Text by Default

delay.description: Set how long to hover before the preview appears.
delay.title: Hover Delay

hover.description: Show a full-content preview when hovering over a record.
hover.title: Hover Preview

space.description: Hold Space to preview the currently selected record.
space.title: Space Preview

clearOnHide.description: Clear the search keyword and show the full list next time the clipboard window opens.
clearOnHide.title: Clear Search on Next Open

defaultFocus.description: Select the search box when the clipboard window opens so you can type keywords right away.
defaultFocus.title: Focus Search on Window Open

sort.description: Choose the default order for history records when no search is active.
sort.title: Default Sort Order

collectSecrets.description: Choose whether high-confidence keys, tokens, and similar secrets are saved to history.
collectSecrets.title: Save Sensitive Content

redactSecrets.description: Show saved sensitive content with only the first and last characters visible, replacing the middle with *.
redactSecrets.title: Redacted Display

openClipboard.description: Open or hide the clipboard window from any app.
openClipboard.title: Open Clipboard Window

openPreference.description: Open or hide the preferences window from any app.
openPreference.title: Open Preferences Window

winV.description: When enabled, press Win+V to summon the EcoPaste clipboard window, replacing the Windows system clipboard history panel.
winV.title: Open Clipboard Window with Win+V

excludedApps.description: Content copied from these apps will not be saved to history.
excludedApps.title: Ignored Apps

autoCheck.description: Periodically check whether a new EcoPaste version is available.
autoCheck.title: Automatically Check for Updates

beta.description: Receive beta test versions when checking for updates.
beta.title: Include Beta Versions

frequency.description: Set how often EcoPaste checks for updates.
frequency.title: Update Check Frequency

idleDestroySeconds.description: Release secondary WebViews such as preferences, preview, and context menus after they have been hidden for this long; they rebuild automatically next time.
idleDestroySeconds.title: Secondary Window Idle Release

lightweightMode.description: Pause unnecessary refresh work after the clipboard window hides, and release secondary rendering resources after they become idle.
lightweightMode.title: Lightweight Mode

position.description: Choose where the clipboard window opens each time.
position.title: Open Position

scrollToTopOnOpen.description: Return to the newest items at the top whenever the clipboard window opens.
scrollToTopOnOpen.title: Return to Top on Open

selectCategoryOnOpen.description: Choose which content category to switch to whenever the clipboard window opens.
selectCategoryOnOpen.title: Select Category on Open

selectGroupOnOpen.description: Choose which custom group to switch to whenever the clipboard window opens.
selectGroupOnOpen.title: Select Group on Open

selectRangeOnOpen.description: Choose which history range to switch to whenever the clipboard window opens.
selectRangeOnOpen.title: Select Range on Open

storageLocation.resetConfirmContent: EcoPaste will move the current history database, settings, and resource cache back to the default data directory, then delete the current custom data directory after migration succeeds.
